history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly in front is row 02 column C, which is lava, so I must not move forward. The goal is at row 04 column D. A safe way to progress is to turn down toward row 03 column B, which is open.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell in front is row 03 column B, which is safe, so I should move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell in front is row 04 column B, which is safe. Moving forward is the best step toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell in front is row 05 column B, which is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is to my right at row 04 column D, but there is lava at row 04 column C, so I should turn left to face right? No, from down, turning counter-clockwise makes me face right, which would lead toward the lava. Turning clockwise makes me face left, which is also blocked. Since forward is blocked and I need a safe way to navigate, the only useful orientation change toward progress is to face right and then reassess.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell in front, row 04 column C, is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. I should avoid it and turn clockwise to face down, where the cell ahead is also a wall, but this changes orientation without stepping into lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell in front is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face right. From down to right, I should rotate counter-clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The goal O is directly ahead at row 04 column D, but the next cell row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward safely. I need to avoid the lava by going upward into row 03 column B, so I should face up.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing up. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there keeps me on a path around the lava toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe, and moving forward brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing up. The cell ahead is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below and to the right, so I should turn right to face east and continue navigating around the lava.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so I must not move forward. To avoid lava and still head toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn clockwise to face down.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal while avoiding lava.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so moving forward is the best step toward the goal at row 04 column D.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 05 column B is a wall, so I cannot move forward. To head toward the goal at row 04 column D without stepping on lava at C, I should turn left to face right.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 04 column C is lava, so I cannot move forward. The safe way to continue toward the goal at row 04 column D is to go up first.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>
